I have never hated anything more than being on a 9:00pm Friday train to NYC from NJ with a bunch of Rutgers freshmen
It is very interesting to hear people who don't understand how the train works explain how they think the train works to the people around.

I just had a heart attack because the conductor said Penn Station and I thought I missed my stop. 

It was Newark Penn Station. Every time.
